entries.notes: Suspected AI-generated artist on YouTube Music.
Confirmed by the band itself as a 'synthetic music project guided by human creative direction'. 1.4M monthly Spotify listeners (2025).
Reached #1 on Billboard Country Digital Song Sales with 'Walk my Walk'. 2.5M monthly Spotify listeners. Widely reported as AI-generated (2025).
AI-powered artist signed to Hallwood Media (multimillion-dollar deal). Created by Telisha 'Nikki' Jones using Suno. Charted Billboard Adult R&B Airplay and Hot Gospel Songs.
1M+ Spotify monthly listeners. Expert report: music created with Suno and Riffusion. 'Mercy On My Grave' 2M+ streams.
Suno-generated project. ~700K Spotify monthly listeners. 'Dust and Thunder' 800K streams.
AI-generated. 'We Are Charlie Kirk' reached #1 on Spotify Viral 50 U.S.
Well-known Suno-generated retro/novelty music project.
AI-generated singer-songwriter, one of the first (2023).
AI composer, classical and cinematic music.
AI Oasis deepfake project (2023).
Suno-generated project.
Song 'I Run' uses AI to process vocals. Charted on Spotify US & Global 50.
2.7M monthly Spotify listeners. Three tracks on Spotify Viral 50 USA. Shifting avatar/identity; released 10 albums in 4 months.
200K+ Spotify monthly listeners. Identified as AI-generated in expert investigation.
463K Spotify monthly listeners. Flagged as AI-generated in expert investigation.
295K Spotify monthly listeners. Flagged as AI-generated in expert investigation.
200K Spotify monthly listeners. Flagged as AI-generated.
191K Spotify monthly listeners. Flagged as AI-generated.
150K Spotify monthly listeners. Flagged as AI-generated.
126K Spotify monthly listeners. Flagged as AI-generated.
108K Spotify monthly listeners. Flagged as AI-generated.
AI-music creator, originator of viral 'BBL Drizzy' track (2024). Uses Udio/Suno.
Parody-style AI project, most-listened track over 4M plays.
AI artist covering Filipino songs; reached Spotify Philippines Top Artists list.
'A Million Colors' created with Suno; charted TikTok Viral 50.
Creator of viral AI Drake/Weeknd deepfake 'Heart on My Sleeve' (2023).
Auxuman AI avatar artist created by Ash Koosha.
Hyper-real AI pop star from Tencent Music Lyra Lab (2022). Charted in China.
HYBE/Supertone AI alter ego of Lee Hyun. 'Masquerade' released in 6 languages via voice cloning (2023).
Virtual K-pop group by Metaverse Entertainment/Kakao. Debut 'Pandora' (2023) 32M YouTube views.
Supertone AI-voiced virtual group, debut EP 'MVP' (2024).
AI-powered virtual singer signed to Warner Music. Debut single 'Dominoes' (2023).
AI virtual rapper, briefly signed to Capitol Records (2022) then dropped.
AI voice clone / deepfake instrument by Holly Herndon. Artist-led AI project.
AI/neural-net music project generating endless extreme metal and jazz streams since 2017.
AI-assisted human artist. Album 'I AM AI' (2018) composed/produced with AI tools (Amper, AIVA, IBM Watson).
AI-assisted band. Album 'Chain Tripping' (2019) Grammy-nominated, composed with ML models trained on own catalog.
First computer to produce original contemporary classical music (2010).
AI music composition program by David Cope. Released album 'From Darkness, Light' (2009).
AI country act, 842K Spotify monthly listeners. 'Don't Tread On Me' #3 Billboard Country Digital Song Sales. Label: Crusty Records.
First AI artist of Timbaland's Stage Zero label (2025). Created with Suno's Persona feature. Signed to PMG in 2026.
AI post-hardcore project. Bio says 'Human lyrics, turned to songs with AI'. 900K+ Spotify monthly listeners, modeled on Holding Absence.
Tim Boucher's personal AI music project. Released 40 albums in 30 days via Suno.
141K Spotify monthly listeners. Flagged as AI-generated in MBW investigation.
AI artist created by Christopher Jermaine Townsend. Part of Hallwood Media AI roster.
AI artist on Hallwood Media roster (same label as Xania Monet).
AI artist on Hallwood Media roster.
AI artist on Hallwood Media roster.
AI artist on Hallwood Media roster.
SM Entertainment's first AI virtual idol. AI-synthesized voice. Solo debut single 'Done' (Sep 2024).
First algorithm/AI to sign a major label deal (Warner Music, 2019). Generative wellness soundscapes. 356K Spotify monthly listeners.
CGI virtual influencer and musician by Brud Studio. Released 'Not Mine', 'Hard Feelings', and other Spotify singles since 2017.
Pulse9 'all virtual deep-learning real AI' K-pop girl group (2021). Members generated via AI face-synthesis.
Krafton's first hyperrealistic virtual human artist. Music video 'Shine Bright' (Sept 2022).
AI K-pop boy group, seven virtual members, debuted 2025.
YG KPlus virtual AI K-pop idol (2021).
Virtual 5-member K-pop girl group by Kakao Entertainment from survival show GIRL'S RE:VERSE. Debut track 'CHO'.
Virtual K-pop solo artist by AFUN INTERACTIVE/VV Entertainment. 'GETTIN' HIGH' 10M+ views.
Virtual AI influencer/singer by Sidus Studio X (South Korea). Released singles as virtual human.
Japanese AI/CGI virtual model with music collaborations.
World's first digital supermodel / AI virtual artist with music releases.
First virtual singer in Korea (1996). Two full-length albums, ~200K units sold.
Virtual NFT-based singer under Brave Entertainment (debut Dec 2021).
3D digital/virtual girl artist under SAMG Entertainment. Debut single 'Find You' (May 2021).
LG Electronics virtual singer-songwriter/DJ (2021).
Virtual singer under Humap Contents. Tracks include 'Kiss Me' and 'Lonely'.
Virtual K-pop idol from Marvel Future Fight with released songs.
K-pop boy group by Deep Studio Entertainment with two AI/virtual members (Saejin, Seung). Debut 2022.
Virtual K-pop boy group by VLAST using motion-capture + virtual avatars. Debuted 2023.
Virtual K-pop girl group by WAK/Parable Entertainment (2021). Debut 'RE:WIND' 19M+ views.
SM Entertainment K-pop group paired with virtual avatar counterparts (æ-aespa) and AI character Naevis.
Virtual K-pop group featuring virtual dancer Sira, created by EVR Studio.
Four-member virtual streamer group under Bean Entertainment. Single 'MAFIA' (Sept 2023).
3-member metaverse-based virtual K-pop group. Debut single 'Wake Up' (June 2022).
Virtual artist collaboration by YG PLUS featuring Saena and Ayan.
Five-member AI K-pop girl group under GBK Entertainment.
3D virtual human developed by Naver and GiantStep.
AI-driven virtual artist referenced in Billboard 2025 AI music coverage.
Virtual K-pop girl group by Riot Games from League of Legends. Debut 'POP/STARS' (2018).
Virtual League of Legends co-ed group by Riot Games.
Virtual metal band by Riot Games from League of Legends.
